frontend.title: HTML Basics
frontend.description: Semantic HTML, tags, and document structure. This skill is part of the Frontend Development roadmap and focuses on HTML Basics. You will practice these concepts through small, hands-on exercises and real coding examples until they feel natural, rather than just reading about them passively.
